flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Pacific Northwest College of Art are 39% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($34.9k vs $57.2k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Pacific Northwest College of Art fell 30% between 2021 and 2024 (25.7% → 18.1%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Pacific Northwest College of Art fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (35.7% → 29.1%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Pacific Northwest College of Art rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($42.8k → $49.0k).
